title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Kentintrol Valve Group Co., Ltd
body: "Application number 5080  Applicant KOSO Kent Introl Ltd objected to the name used by Kentintrol Valve Group Co., Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal. "
